IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (10839851.pdf)
SUMMARY: Seeking a career in Information Assurance with a focus on Cyber Network Defense.
SKILLS: Desktops, Ethernet cables, Cisco routers, Video & Sound Cards, CD-ROM Drives, Multiplexors, Scanners, Monitors, Switches, TCP/IP Configuration, Active Directory, Avaya, Microsoft Office, Remedy, Information Technology Service Management (ITSM)

SOURCE: 10839851.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 02/2018 to Current
DESCRIPTION: Defines scope, plans and deliverables for assigned projects. Coordinates and collaborates with others in analyzing collected requirements. Confirms and prioritizes project plans. Participates in business and technical information technology solution implementations. Performs maintenance and troubleshoots network connectivity issues.

SOURCE: 10839851.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 08/2010 to 03/2016
DESCRIPTION: Assisted in training foreign nationals on information technology. Diagnosed computer errors and provided technical support. Backed up and restored organizational data files.

SOURCE: 10839851.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 06/2016 to 01/2018
DESCRIPTION: Protected U.S. diplomats while visiting foreign dignitaries. Maintained security awareness in a federal environment.
